2603.23085.title: MedCausalX: Adaptive Causal Reasoning with Self-Reflection for Trustworthy Medical Vision-Language Models
2603.23085.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have enabled interpretable medical diagnosis by integrating visual perception with linguistic reasoning. Yet, existing medical chain-of-thought (CoT) models lack explicit mechanisms to represent and enforce causal reasoning, leaving them vulnerable to spurious correlations and limiting their clinical reliability. We pinpoint three core challenges in medical CoT reasoning: how to adaptively trigger causal correction, construct high-quality causal-spurious contrastive samples, and maintain causal consistency across reasoning trajectories. To address these challenges, we propose MedCausalX, an end-to-end framework explicitly models causal reasoning chains in medical VLMs. We first introduce the CRMed dataset providing fine-grained anatomical annotations, structured causal reasoning chains, and counterfactual variants that guide the learning of causal relationships beyond superficial correlations. Building upon CRMed, MedCausalX employs a two-stage adaptive reflection architecture equipped with $\langle$causal$\rangle$ and $\langle$verify$\rangle$ tokens, enabling the model to autonomously determine when and how to perform causal analysis and verification. Finally, a trajectory-level causal correction objective optimized through error-attributed reinforcement learning refines the reasoning chain, allowing the model to distinguish genuine causal dependencies from shortcut associations. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that MedCausalX consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, improving diagnostic consistency by +5.4 points, reducing hallucination by over 10 points, and attaining top spatial grounding IoU, thereby setting a new standard for causally grounded medical reasoning.
2603.23085.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）通過將視覺感知與語言推理相結合，使可解釋的醫療診斷成為可能。<lb/>然而，現有的醫療思維鏈（CoT）模型缺乏明確的機制來表徵和強化因果推理，這使它們容易受到虛假相關性的影響，並限制了其臨床可靠性。<lb/>我們指出醫療 CoT 推理中的三個核心挑戰：如何自適應地觸發因果修正、構建高質量的因果-虛假對比樣本，以及在推理軌跡中保持因果一致性。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 MedCausalX，一個端到端的框架，明確地在醫療 VLMs 中建模因果推理鏈。<lb/>我們首先介紹了 CRMed 數據集，該數據集提供了細粒度的解剖標註、結構化的因果推理鏈和反事實變體，這些都指導著因果關係的學習，超越表面的相關性。<lb/>基於 CRMed，MedCausalX 採用了一種兩階段自適應反思架構，配備了 $\langle$causal$\rangle$ 和 $\langle$verify$\rangle$ 令牌，使模型能夠自主決定何時以及如何進行因果分析和驗證。<lb/>最後，通過錯誤歸因強化學習優化的軌跡級因果修正目標精煉了推理鏈，使模型能夠區分真正的因果依賴關係與捷徑關聯。<lb/>在多個基準上的廣泛實驗顯示，MedCausalX 始終超越最先進的方法，診斷一致性提高了 +5.4 分，幻覺減少了超過 10 分，並達到了最佳的空間定位 IoU，從而為因果基礎的醫療推理設立了新的標準。
2603.23085.author: Jianxin Lin et.al.
2603.23085.authors: Jianxin Lin, Chunzheng Zhu, Peter J. Kneuertz, Yunfei Bai, Yuan Xue
